=== left_align
# Default left-aligned label.
widget: label
title: Label
width: 20
height: 3
text: Hello world
===
╔═ Label ══════════╗
║Hello world       ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== center_align
# Center-aligned label.
widget: label
title: Label
width: 20
height: 3
align: center
text: Hello world
===
╔═ Label ══════════╗
║   Hello world    ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== right_align
# Right-aligned label.
widget: label
title: Label
width: 20
height: 3
align: right
text: Hello world
===
╔═ Label ══════════╗
║       Hello world║
╚══════════════════╝

=== long_text_truncated
# Text longer than the interior width — must not overflow the border.
widget: label
title: Label
width: 14
height: 3
text: This is a very long label text
===
╔═ Label ════╗
║This is a ver
╚════════════╝
